General.Name: Madison Holdings Group Ltd
General.Description: Madison Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, retails and wholesales wine products and other alcoholic beverages in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Sales of Alcoholic Beverages, Loan Financing Services, and Financial Services segments. It also offers wine storage; financial and business consultancy; and loan financing, microfinance, and loan referral services. The company was formerly known as Madison Wine Holdings Limited and changed its name to Madison Holdings Group Limited in July 2017. Madison Holdings Group Limited was founded in 1997 and is based in Wong Chuk Hang, Hong Kong.
General.Address: One Island South, Wong Chuk Hang, Hong Kong
